questionHtml: Deduce, giving reasons, which brown pelican population decreased the most in the years following the study.
markschemeHtml:
1. California, as most eggs have a high level of DDE / most eggshells are thinning;
  2. (California as) less chicks hatching (results in smaller population size)
    OR
    (California as) birth rate less than death rate (so decrease in population);

meta.title: Deduce, giving reasons, which brown pelican population decreased the most in the years following the study.
breadcrumbLabels: D4.2.9. Biomagnification of pollutants in natural ecosystems
